parsedContent.feedback: The answer provided does not fully address the question. It only mentions two keyboard shortcuts (ctrl+z and ctrl+y) without explaining their functions or the importance of keyboard shortcuts in website development. A complete answer should include the significance of keyboard shortcuts and provide examples with their respective functions.
parsedContent.correctedAnswer: Keyboard shortcuts are important in website development because they save time and improve efficiency, allowing developers to work faster without switching between the mouse and keyboard. Two examples are: Ctrl + Z — Undoes the last action; Ctrl + Y — Redoes the last undone action.
